title: erigeron eatonii var. sonnei
intro: Erigeron eatonii var. sonnei, also known as Sonne's Fleabane, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to the southwestern United States and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating colds and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include relieving congestion, coughs, and sore throats, as well as reducing fever and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of Sonne's Fleabane typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the plant's leaves, stems, and flowers, which can be used to make teas, salves, or syrups.
